text: Every day, I follow a consistent routine that helps me stay productive and healthy. I wake up at 6:30 a.m., drink a glass of water, and go for a 20-minute jog. After breakfast, I start my work schedule from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m., with a short break for lunch. In the afternoon, I do simple exercises like stretching or light weight training. In the evening, I unwind by reading a book or watching a movie. I always go to bed by 10:30 p.m. This routine keeps me balanced and energised throughout the week.
